message:
Streamline dependencies and update Cargo manifest

Clean up dependency tree and update Cargo.toml:

- Remove unused transitive dependencies
- Update version constraints for active dependencies
- Simplify feature flag configurations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
